note: Fresh, distinct, independent run; state re-derived from disk and every gate re-executed LIVE. Working tree clean aside from pre-existing modified _trace.jsonl/review.json/verify.json artifacts. Live evidence captured under evidence/_verify-live/.

summary: Independent fresh-context verification on branch build/walking-skeleton-smoke. Every blocking pre-merge gate re-run LIVE from disk and confirmed green: smoke 1/0 (12 expects, exit 0), tsc --noEmit clean (exit 0), secret-redaction 5/0 (exit 0), hermetic e2e 3/0 (exit 0), and bare `bun test` (CI) 101 pass / 2 skip / 0 fail exit 0 reproduced TWICE. All RBG pairs reproduced LIVE and are genuine real-test failures: smoke (Expected 1 Received 0 under BREAK_MATCHER=1, exit 1), tsc (TS2322 on injected src probe, exit 2 -> restored exit 0), secret-scan (planted key detected, product source clean), full-suite (1 fail under BREAK_MATCHER=1, exit 1). Slice is hermetic — no Cue/network/mic/key imports (verified by reading types.ts, matcher.ts, replay/harness.ts, obs/trace.ts, smoke test) and traverses transcript->decision->trace. The earlier bare-`bun test` non-reproducibility concern did not reproduce. PASS.
